race.comment: Handy race and like the chances of SOMEWHERE (2) who presents third-up off two good runs this time in off a long spell. He got home nicely fresh before a tough effort at big odds at Caulfield when just missing in a driving finish. Peaks now back in grade and will go close. PERFECT TEN (11) is the danger. She's flying this time in, winning over this route two back before just finding one better last time. Takes on the boys now but sets up very well with Williams booked. FEDERER (3) resumes off a long break. He got out over more ground last time in as his stout pedigree would suggest but this is a good spot fresh if he's wound up, watch the market. ORIENTAL SMOKE (4) struggled in Adelaide last time but had won well prior and can do better off a let up.
